calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRIAL COURT)
Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sean M. SeLegue, counsel for Plaintiff Nicole Piccinini Pesco as personal representative of the Estate of Robert Piccinini; William Henley, counsel for Defendant Schapiro-Thorn, Inc.

Mr. Henley advises the Court that his client has no objection to the Plaintiff's response to the OSC and supports the Plaintiff's position not to dismiss the complaint in interpleader since there is, indeed, a final judgment with respect to the complaint in interpleader.
After brief comment by Mr. SeLegue, the Court grants the request to discharge the Order to Show Cause.

Judge: Hon. Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Kim Richardson, CSR# 5915, Aiken & Welch, 877-451-1580.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-01-2017 Continued To Jun-02-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 306
MINI MINUTES: Jeremy T. Kamras, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff. After argument of counsel the Court Ordered OSC re-scheduled. OSC to be heard by Judge Ulmer in Department 306. Clerk to obtain a date from Department 306 and give notice. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings reported by: Joanna Broadwell, CSR #10959 Telephone # (415) 274 9977 (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2017 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-18-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Continued To Mar-08-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
